name: SecureNet
description: FreeInk TLS 1.3 networking: a wolfSSL-backed SecureClient and an HTTPClient-compatible SecureHttpClient shim that bypass the precompiled system mbedTLS (which ships TLS 1.3 as empty stubs). Opt-in via -DFREEINK_NET_WOLFSSL=1 plus a wolfSSL lib_dep.
notes: When FREEINK_NET_WOLFSSL is defined, add a wolfSSL source library to the consuming project's lib_deps (e.g. wolfssl/wolfssl) and provide a wolfSSL user_settings.h enabling TLS 1.3 + PSA.
